**For high performance + athlete support**: High-performance individuals may benefit from a more frequent dosing schedule (e.g., a 2-day dose every week). Best if taken 24 hrs and 1 hr prior to your most strenuous exercise.

## What is cellular senescence?

Everyone has senescent cells, and they are present throughout our body, including in the skin, brain, muscles, and heart. Everyday stressors, including poor diet, lack of sleep, psychological stress, and sun and environmental exposure, can trigger cells to become senescent. Normally, senescent cells are cleared within days to weeks by our immune cells. As we age, however, senescent cells accumulate—accumulating exponentially faster after 60—and impede immune function, creating a snowball effect that leads to even more senescent cells. As they build up in our body and persist, senescent cells can induce “inflammaging”, a type of inflammation associated with aging, and alter the microenvironment of the tissue and its function.

![]()

Elysium’s Senolytic Complex is based on leading institutional research in the field of cellular senescence and has been demonstrated to clear senescent cells in two different human cell lines in laboratory studies. The formulation contains fisetin and quercetin, two extensively researched flavonoids found in fruits and vegetables with potent senolytic activity. The Complex also includes powerful compounds derived from Chinese ginseng and chestnut rose extracts, which have been shown in human clinical trials to accelerate senescent cell clearance, improve recovery and endurance, and support muscle remodeling and cellular rejuvenation after strenuous exercise.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the Senolytic Complex?

The formulation of Elysium’s Senolytic Complex is based on leading research in the field of cellular senescence and is proven to clear senescent human cells in laboratory studies. The Complex contains potent senolytics quercetin (*Sophora japonica*) and fisetin (*Rhus succedanea*). It also contains extracts of Chinese ginseng (*Panax notoginseng*) and chestnut rose (*Rosa roxburghii*), which further support normal senolytic activity, and promote exercise recovery and endurance after strenuous exercise.

### What is cellular senescence?

When cells age or experience excessive stress, they enter a zombie-like state called senescence. Senescent cells secrete pro-inflammatory molecules that can trigger neighboring healthy cells to age faster. As we age, our ability to clear these cells declines and they accumulate over time. Adding Elysium’s Senolytic Complex to your health routine can aid in removing senescent cell buildup.

### Can I take the senolytic with your other supplements?

Yes! You’re welcome to take the Senolytic Complex alongside our other Elysium supplements and no contraindications or interactions have been observed. In addition, combining senolytics compounds that clear senescent cells with NAD+ boosting supplements like Basis or Signal may support a more comprehensive method to improve your healthy-to-senescent cell ratio.

### Why should I take a senolytic with Basis or Signal?

The age-related decline in NAD+ levels compromises cellular health and can promote cellular senescence. Senescent cells, which are metabolically demanding and consume large amounts of NAD+, can further exacerbate the decline of this vital coenzyme. Combining senolytics, which clear senescent cells, with NAD+ boosters like Basis or Signal, which promote cellular health, delivers a one-two punch to promote cellular youth and decrease the burden of pro-inflammatory cells.

### Is this the same complex that’s in Format?

Format as a product will not change and will continue to be offered as a two-part innovative system designed to provide advanced immune support. If you are looking to adjust the dosage of the Senolytic Complex, you’re welcome to place a separate subscription order in addition to your current Format deliveries to achieve the desired protocol.

## What is cellular senescence?

Everyone has senescent cells, and they are present throughout our body, including in the skin, brain, muscles, and heart. Everyday stressors, including poor diet, lack of sleep, psychological stress, and sun and environmental exposure, can trigger cells to become senescent. Normally, senescent cells are cleared within days to weeks by our immune cells. As we age, however, senescent cells accumulate—accumulating exponentially faster after 60—and impede immune function, creating a snowball effect that leads to even more senescent cells. As they build up in our body and persist, senescent cells can induce “inflammaging”, a type of inflammation associated with aging, and alter the microenvironment of the tissue and its function.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is the Senolytic Complex?

The formulation of Elysium’s Senolytic Complex is based on leading research in the field of cellular senescence and is proven to clear senescent human cells in laboratory studies. The Complex contains potent senolytics quercetin (*Sophora japonica*) and fisetin (*Rhus succedanea*). It also contains extracts of Chinese ginseng (*Panax notoginseng*) and chestnut rose (*Rosa roxburghii*), which further support normal senolytic activity, and promote exercise recovery and endurance after strenuous exercise.

### What is cellular senescence?

When cells age or experience excessive stress, they enter a zombie-like state called senescence. Senescent cells secrete pro-inflammatory molecules that can trigger neighboring healthy cells to age faster. As we age, our ability to clear these cells declines and they accumulate over time. Adding Elysium’s Senolytic Complex to your health routine can aid in removing senescent cell buildup.

### Can I take the senolytic with your other supplements?

Yes! You’re welcome to take the Senolytic Complex alongside our other Elysium supplements and no contraindications or interactions have been observed. In addition, combining senolytics compounds that clear senescent cells with NAD+ boosting supplements like Basis or Signal may support a more comprehensive method to improve your healthy-to-senescent cell ratio.

### Why should I take a senolytic with Basis or Signal?

The age-related decline in NAD+ levels compromises cellular health and can promote cellular senescence. Senescent cells, which are metabolically demanding and consume large amounts of NAD+, can further exacerbate the decline of this vital coenzyme. Combining senolytics, which clear senescent cells, with NAD+ boosters like Basis or Signal, which promote cellular health, delivers a one-two punch to promote cellular youth and decrease the burden of pro-inflammatory cells.
